session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. Do NOT try to fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check formatting and run tests

session.assistant:
## Summary
**make fast-ci passed successfully**
All checks passed with excellent results:
**Linting & Formatting:** - All linting checks passed - 1640 files already formatted - All Prettier checks passed
**Type Checking:** - ty: All checks passed
**Tests:** - erk unit tests: 5658 passed in 12.86s - erk-dev tests: 136 passed in 4.45s - erk-statusline tests: 115 passed in 0.82s - erk-mcp tests: All passed
**Documentation:** - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: up to date - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md validation: PASSED (19 files checked, 0 violations)
**Total:** All fast-ci checks passed without any issues.
